description: Create multi-stage Dockerfiles for all 11 services following the existing quantmail Dockerfile pattern. Each uses node:22-alpine, pnpm workspace, multi-stage build, non-root user, and health checks.
steps: Create services/identity/Dockerfile for the QuantMail auth/OAuth service (entry: apps/quantmail/api-v2/app.ts, port 3001). Model directly from existing apps/quantmail/Dockerfile pattern. Dependencies: packages/common, packages/auth, packages/server-core.

Create services/chat-api/Dockerfile for QuantChat (entry: apps/quantchat/backend/app.ts, port 3002). Dependencies: packages/common, packages/auth, packages/server-core, packages/database, packages/ai, packages/realtime.

Create services/mail-api/Dockerfile for QuantMail main service (entry: apps/quantmail/api-v2/app.ts, port 3001). This is the full mail app vs identity being auth-only. Dependencies: packages/common, packages/auth, packages/server-core, packages/database.

Create services/ai-api/Dockerfile for QuantAI (entry: apps/quantai/backend/app.ts, port 3020). Dependencies: packages/common, packages/auth, packages/server-core, packages/database, packages/ai, packages/realtime.

Create services/sync-api/Dockerfile for QuantSync (entry: apps/quantsync/backend/app.ts, port 3004). Dependencies: packages/common, packages/auth, packages/server-core, packages/database, packages/ai, packages/realtime.

Create services/ads-api/Dockerfile for QuantAds (entry: apps/quantads/backend/app.ts, port 3005). Dependencies: packages/common, packages/auth, packages/server-core, packages/database, packages/ai, packages/realtime.

Create services/tube-api/Dockerfile for QuantTube (entry: apps/quantube/backend/app.ts, port 3006). Dependencies: packages/common, packages/auth, packages/server-core, packages/database, packages/ai, packages/realtime.

Create services/neon-api/Dockerfile for QuantNeon (entry: apps/quantneon/backend/app.ts, port 3007). Dependencies: packages/common, packages/auth, packages/server-core, packages/database, packages/ai, packages/realtime.

Create services/edits-api/Dockerfile for QuantEdits (entry: apps/quantedits/backend/app.ts, port 3008). Dependencies: packages/common, packages/auth, packages/server-core, packages/database, packages/ai, packages/realtime.

Create services/max-api/Dockerfile for QuantMax (entry: apps/quantmax/backend/app.ts, port 3009). Dependencies: packages/common, packages/auth, packages/server-core, packages/database, packages/ai, packages/realtime.
Create services/ws-gateway/Dockerfile for the WebSocket gateway (entry: packages/realtime/src/websocket-server.ts, port 8080). Dependencies: packages/common, packages/realtime.
Create a root .dockerignore file to exclude node_modules, .git, dist, coverage, etc.
acceptance_criteria: All 11 Dockerfiles exist under services/ directory
Each Dockerfile uses multi-stage build (builder + runner stages)
Each uses node:22-alpine as base image
Each creates and runs as non-root user
Each correctly copies workspace dependencies (pnpm workspace pattern)
Each sets NODE_ENV=production and exposes the correct port
verification: Verify all Dockerfile syntax is valid by checking for required directives (FROM, WORKDIR, COPY, RUN, USER, EXPOSE, HEALTHCHECK, CMD)
Run pnpm turbo build to ensure no existing code was broken
findings: All 11 Dockerfiles created with correct directives verified. commit-msg hook requires unset NODE_OPTIONS due to sandbox proxy-bootstrap.js issue. pnpm turbo build times out in sandbox but targeted tsc --noEmit passes fine. Changes are purely additive (new files only).
